creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Dirk-Willem,

you sent a followup to ports/146713 (see [1]) containing a shar file.
Updates to existing ports should generally be sent in unified diff format
(as produced by "diff -u"), not as shar files, as diffs make it easier to
see what changed. Furthermore, the PR already contained a patch to update
the port, and you didn't add any comment explaining what is different with
your update.

Could you send a followup to the PR with a unified diff and with some kind
of explanation?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/146713
